name: Sotherly Hotels Inc.
summary: PART I Organization MHI Hospitality Corporation (the Company) is a self-managed and self-administered real estate investment trust, or REIT, that was formed in August 2004 to own, acquire, renovate and reposition full-service, primarily upper upscale and upscale hotel properties located in primary markets in the Mid-Atlantic and Southern United States.
